name: OPTIC NERVE
chapter: DIFFERENTIAL DIAGNOSIS OF ORBITAL AND OCULAR DISORDERS
definition: lens-shaped thickening single / multiple nodules along nerve-sheath complex usually due to tumor uniform enlargement of nerve-sheath complex
dominant_finding: fusiform thickening of optic nerve-sheath complex
discriminating_features: fusiform thickening of optic nerve-sheath complex
excrescentic thickening of optic nerve-sheath complex
tubular enlargement of optic nerve-sheath complex

general: fusiform thickening of optic nerve-sheath complex
excrescentic thickening of optic nerve-sheath complex
tubular enlargement of optic nerve-sheath complex
